leadText: Marvel Scale (Japanese: ふしぎなうろこ Marvelous Scale) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation V, it was the signature Ability of Milotic.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] While the Pokémon with this Ability has a non-volatile status condition , its Defense is increased by 50%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Marvel Scale has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] While the Pokémon with this Ability has a non-volatile status condition , its Defense is increased by 50%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts Defense if there is a status problem. MD T D S Boosts the Pokémon's Defense when it has any status problems. B S L わるいじょうたいに なったときに ぼうぎょが あがる MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokémon gets a bad status condition, its Defense goes up! MD RT DX When the Pokémon gets a bad status condition, such as poison or paralysis, its Defense goes up.
